entries.name: main-theorem
equ1
momentum-bound-lemma
entries.proof:
Denoting $\Gamma_k=\mathbf{G}_k-
abla f(\mathbf{X}_k)$, we have $\mathbb{E}_k\left[\Gamma_k ig|\mathcal{F}_{k-1}ight]=0$ and $\mathbb{E}_k\left[\left\|\Gamma_kight\|_F^2 ig|\mathcal{F}_{k-1}ight]\leq\sigma_F^2$. From the update of $\mathbf{M}_k$, we have
 egin{eqnarray}
 egin{aligned}
otag
\mathbf{M}_k-
abla f(\mathbf{X}_k)=& 	heta \mathbf{M}_{k-1} + (1-	heta)\mathbf{G}_k - 
abla f(\mathbf{X}_k)\
=& 	heta \left(\mathbf{M}_{k-1}-
abla f(\mathbf{X}_{k-1})ight) + (1-	heta)\left(
abla f(\mathbf{X}_k)+\Gamma_kight) - 
abla f(\mathbf{X}_k) + 	heta
abla f(\mathbf{X}_{k-1})\
=& 	heta \left(\mathbf{M}_{k-1}-
abla f(\mathbf{X}_{k-1})ight) + (1-	heta)\Gamma_k - 	heta\left(
abla f(\mathbf{X}_k)-
abla f(\mathbf{X}_{k-1})ight)
\end{aligned}
\end{eqnarray}
and
 egin{eqnarray}
 egin{aligned}
otag
&\mathbb{E}_k\left[\left\|
abla f(\mathbf{X}_k)-\mathbf{M}_kight\|_F^2 ig|\mathcal{F}_{k-1}ight]\
=&\left\|	heta \left(\mathbf{M}_{k-1}-
abla f(\mathbf{X}_{k-1})ight) - 	heta\left(
abla f(\mathbf{X}_k)-
abla f(\mathbf{X}_{k-1})ight)ight\|_F^2 + (1-	heta)^2\mathbb{E}_k\left[\left\|\Gamma_kight\|_F^2 ig|\mathcal{F}_{k-1}ight]\
\leq& 	heta^2\hspace*{-0.05cm}\left(\hspace*{-0.05cm}1\hspace*{-0.05cm}+\hspace*{-0.05cm} rac{1\hspace*{-0.05cm}-\hspace*{-0.05cm}	heta}{	heta}ight)\hspace*{-0.05cm}\left\|\mathbf{M}_{k-1}\hspace*{-0.05cm}-\hspace*{-0.05cm}
abla f(\mathbf{X}_{k-1})ight\|_F^2 \hspace*{-0.05cm}+\hspace*{-0.05cm} 	heta^2\hspace*{-0.05cm}\left(\hspace*{-0.05cm}1\hspace*{-0.05cm}+\hspace*{-0.05cm} rac{	heta}{1\hspace*{-0.05cm}-\hspace*{-0.05cm}	heta}ight)\hspace*{-0.05cm}\left\|
abla f(\mathbf{X}_k)\hspace*{-0.05cm}-\hspace*{-0.05cm}
abla f(\mathbf{X}_{k-1})ight\|_F^2 \hspace*{-0.05cm}+\hspace*{-0.05cm} (1\hspace*{-0.05cm}-\hspace*{-0.05cm}	heta)^2\mathbb{E}_k\hspace*{-0.05cm}\left[\left\|\Gamma_kight\|_F^2 ig|\mathcal{F}_{k-1}ight]\
\leq& 	heta\left\|\mathbf{M}_{k-1}-
abla f(\mathbf{X}_{k-1})ight\|_F^2 +  rac{1}{1-	heta}\left\|
abla f(\mathbf{X}_k)-
abla f(\mathbf{X}_{k-1})ight\|_F^2 + (1-	heta)^2\sigma_F^2\
\leq& 	heta\left\|\mathbf{M}_{k-1}-
abla f(\mathbf{X}_{k-1})ight\|_F^2 +  rac{L^2}{1-	heta}\left\|\mathbf{X}_k-\mathbf{X}_{k-1}ight\|_F^2 + (1-	heta)^2\sigma_F^2\
=& 	heta\left\|\mathbf{M}_{k-1}-
abla f(\mathbf{X}_{k-1})ight\|_F^2 +  rac{L^2\eta^2}{1-	heta}\left\|\mathbf{P}_{k-2} rac{\mathbf{P}_{k-2}^T\mathbf{M}_{k-1}\mathbf{Q}_{k-2}}{\sqrt{\mathbf{V}_{k-1}+\varepsilon}}\mathbf{Q}_{k-2}^Tight\|_F^2 + (1-	heta)^2\sigma_F^2\
=& 	heta\left\|\mathbf{M}_{k-1}-
abla f(\mathbf{X}_{k-1})ight\|_F^2 +  rac{L^2\eta^2}{1-	heta}\left\| rac{\mathbf{P}_{k-2}^T\mathbf{M}_{k-1}\mathbf{Q}_{k-2}}{\sqrt{\mathbf{V}_{k-1}+\varepsilon}}ight\|_F^2 + (1-	heta)^2\sigma_F^2\
\leq& 	heta\left\|\mathbf{M}_{k-1}-
abla f(\mathbf{X}_{k-1})ight\|_F^2 +  rac{L^2\eta^2}{(1-	heta)\sqrt{\varepsilon}}\left\| rac{\mathbf{P}_{k-2}^T\mathbf{M}_{k-1}\mathbf{Q}_{k-2}}{\sqrt[4]{\mathbf{V}_{k-1}+\varepsilon}}ight\|_F^2 + (1-	heta)^2\sigma_F^2.
\end{aligned}
\end{eqnarray}
